scripts.dev: concurrently -k -s first "../../target/debug/fireline-streams" "sh -c 'until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:7474/healthz >/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; ../../target/debug/fireline --control-plane --port 4440 --durable-streams-url http://127.0.0.1:7474/v1/stream'" "sh -c 'until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:7474/healthz >/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; ../../target/debug/fireline --control-plane --port 5440 --durable-streams-url http://127.0.0.1:7474/v1/stream'" "sh -c 'until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4440/healthz >/dev/null && curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:5440/healthz >/dev/null; do sleep 0.1; done; tsx --tsconfig ../tsconfig.json index.ts'"
